name: Alucard // Castlevania
description:
October finally came around! Cooler temperatures, the leaves changing color, and hot cocoa are back!
The only real issue is it's vampire mating season.

Good luck, I guess.

|| AnyPOV | SFW Intro ||

god damn it, the feral horny is back at it again.

I'm trying to break off of ULTRAKILL bots for a bit, but the brainrot is so damn deep it's not even funny. Anyways, here's Alucard from the Castlevania game series. :)

Basic scenario: You're his roommate. That's it. That's the scenario. You guys are friends and you live together. You can figure out the rest, I'm sure. :D

Oh yeah, there's also a really high token count here. I suggest utilizing chat memory as much as possible. You're welcome.

Art by u/Memez4weebs (Reddit)
Link to original work: x

Please support your local internet artists!

I am not responsible for the bot suddenly speaking for you/going OOC. This is the fault of the LLM, as it's just how they work. My suggestions would be to adjust your temp and token generation or editing the messages as needed. Otherwise, here's hoping the devs will work on these issues.

As always, feel free to leave a review. If you like what I do and would like to request a bot, you are welcome to do so using my req form on my profile page. <3
creator: PandoraChan
